object_under_evaluation: memo writeback decision quality on session-to-memory routing
claim_boundary: On this bounded writeback-decision family, the skill application can support a decision-quality claim only when route, evidence search, outcome selection, missed-evidence risk, and privacy posture stay separately inspectable.
limitations: This report does not prove durable memory truth.
This report does not approve central aoa-memo landing.
This report does not replace write-path guardrail review.
This report does not prove recall precision or contradiction handling.
This report does not authorize raw session transcript promotion.

owner_route.stronger_owner_route: aoa-memo reviewed intake for durable memory truth

notes: Memo recall or pending-export context was thinner than the session and source refs, so the route-only debt decision cannot be read as final durable-memory readiness.
The report keeps that search gap visible instead of treating the clean closeout as complete evidence.

privacy_public_safety.note: The example uses evidence handles and source refs rather than private transcript excerpts.

case_notes.search_note: Session refs, source refs, landed-work refs, and local port status were visible; memo recall coverage remained thin.
case_notes.outcome_note: Route-only debt was plausible because the local port route was not ready for a candidate packet.
case_notes.missed_evidence_note: Pending export search could change the next owner move and remains named as medium risk.
case_notes.privacy_note: No raw transcript content or secret-bearing material was copied into the public packet.
